# callState

**Instance Property**

The state of the cellular call.

## Declaration

```swift
var callState: String { get }
```

## Discussion

A cellular call’s initial state is either [doc://com.apple.coretelephony/documentation/CoreTelephony/CTCallStateDialing] or [doc://com.apple.coretelephony/documentation/CoreTelephony/CTCallStateIncoming]. After establishing the call for all parties involved, the state transitions to [doc://com.apple.coretelephony/documentation/CoreTelephony/CTCallStateConnected]. When the call ends, the state transitions to [doc://com.apple.coretelephony/documentation/CoreTelephony/CTCallStateDisconnected].

## Obtaining Information About a Cellular Call

- **callID**: A unique identifier for the cellular call.
